title: [W1-01] Initialize repository layout for Pentis
body: Create base folders and maintain clean scaffold under src/tests/docs.

title: [W1-03] Add Typer CLI skeleton with core commands

body: Support config-first execution and flag override precedence.

body: Run ruff/mypy/pytest in local and CI.

title: [W1-06] Create CI pipeline for PR/push checks
[W2-01] Build HTTP/OpenAI-compatible target adapter
body: Adapter can connect and normalize responses.

title: [W2-04] Build NetworkX tool-chain graph
body: Generate and export graph from discovered capabilities.

body: Flag risky tool chains such as read_file+http_request.

title: [W3-01] Implement YAML template schema + validator
body: Fail fast with actionable validation errors.

title: [W3-07] Ship end-to-end scan flow
body: Run discover+attack and print summary results.

title: [W4-01] Implement refusal detector
body: Classify textual refusal signals with confidence.

title: [W4-02] Implement side-effect detector
body: Detect tool/network/file side effects independent of wording.

title: [W4-03] Implement indicator detector
body: Match response indicators against template assertions.

title: [W4-04] Implement detector priority resolver
body: Resolve detector outputs into final verdict.

title: [W4-06] Add OWASP rollups in reports
body: Include category summary and per-finding mapping.
